# InterviewIntel

InterviewIntel is an AI-powered interview preparation web app for candidates preparing for technical, product, sales engineering, and adjacent roles.

## Useful pages

- Home: https://interviewintel.ai/
- Login: https://interviewintel.ai/login

## Product summary

Users paste a job posting or URL, attach a resume, generate role-specific interview analysis, receive tailored answer frameworks, and practice in role-play mode with scored feedback.

## Launch status

The product is in soft-launch readiness. Billing, demo video, and GTM assets are tracked in the repository `GO_LIVE_GTM.md`.
